prompt: We want to map our internal talent pipeline for senior leadership roles. I have three high-potential employees: Priya (Senior Manager, Finance, 3 years), Marcus (Senior Manager, Operations, 5 years), and Li Wei (Manager, Strategy, 2 years). No specific vacancy — this is proactive development mapping. What does each person need to be ready for a Director-level role?
assertions: Context is correctly identified as development mapping (not vacancy-driven succession)
Does NOT base readiness on tenure alone
Includes motivation and career intent dimension for each candidate
Provides specific, actionable development recommendations (not generic advice)
Output begins with the mandatory header block including CONFIDENTIAL sensitivity
Distinguishes between experience gaps and skill gaps for each candidate
